betterquesting:10.desc:8:
I am finding myself quite intrigued by the powers at the Meatball Man's disposal.
Sure, if I had to guess, out of all vices, gluttony is a common one. The temptation of one extra bowl of goulash, an extra slice of pizza, of extra fries with your double burger. I get it, gluttony is everywhere.
And I guess that is why the pull of the Meatball Man is so much stronger than the one from a Fractallite like the one responsible for the powers in Gallifrey.
Not all Missions are created equal. Some touch a lot of people, some are mostly behind the scenes. And yet, as people that are born mortal, even as Fractallites, we still crave recognition, acknowledgment.
And some fractallites, they craved more, so much so to be willing to put themselved under the wing of the Meatball Man.
